text_block_list.name: Mid-level Trainer
text_block_list.text: What a run… she might be someone who can aim for the top…!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... Huff...!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hah... whew...!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Phew…! Mm-hmm, today might be turning out pretty good?
choice_data_list: <size=34>(As I thought, her skill is head and shoulders above the rest…)</size>

text_block_list.name: Mid-level Trainer
text_block_list.text: Excellent work! Your sustained speed is especially impressive! Why don’t you let me help bring out that talent?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I’ve seen her get scouted like that plenty of times already. Even from my perspective as a rookie, it wouldn’t be strange if she already had someone in charge.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: —So, I was scouted, but… I decided to turn it down this time.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: [ You’ll definitely find a good trainer! ] …Mm-hm, thanks ♡ Finding the right person really comes down to timing and chance.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: It's like staking your entire career on that person, you know? It's such an important decision, so I don’t want to make a decision half-heartedly.

text_block_list.name: Hard Worker@Overseas Posting
text_block_list.text: At Tracen Academy, you can’t debut without a trainer, right? Is Loves-chan gonna be okay? Like, about her debut timing and stuff?”
choice_data_list: <size=29>If she’s aiming to debut this year, she should be making a decision soon.</size>

text_block_list.name: Hard Worker@Overseas Posting
text_block_list.text: Oh, really! Wait, Bridge-san, are you actually pretty knowledgeable about this stuff?
choice_data_list: N-no, I only heard that somewhere…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I quickly tried to cover it up. If my identity were exposed, keeping things as they are would probably be impossible. I need to be careful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day. As I passed by the cafeteria, I spotted a familiar figure once again.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hehe, to be approached by such a seasoned veteran is truly an honor.
choice_data_list: <size=42>(That person has also handled GI Umamusumes…)</size>

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text: I can take you to the heights you’re aiming for. Why not put that talent to work in the graded stakes… no, on the GI stage itself?
choice_data_list: (It’s decided. I can’t find a reason to refuse.)

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: ―I turned it down ♡

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: [ Do you have that strong of a reason? ] you’d say? Hmm… well, that’s true. Getting scouted by a GI trainer, anyone would normally leap at the chance.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Considering the trainer’s track record, I know this is definitely an offer I should accept. But—

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I’d like you to shut down this so-called fan community. ―That’s the condition of the contract.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text: Needless hassle or trouble can wear you down mentally and even cause injuries. If you think about priorities as an athlete, you should be able to understand.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: …I understand what you are saying. But… for me, it’s different. You might not understand, though.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: ―[ You don’t need excessive fan interaction to get stronger. ] The ones I’ve turned down before more or less thought the same way.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: ... [ ...Aren’t you scared? ] ...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before I knew it, I had posted such a question. I couldn’t help but ask.
choice_data_list: <size=30>What if you weren’t discovered by someone who truly understands you</size>

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: [ What if you weren’t discovered by someone who truly understands you ] ...huh

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: …Hehe ♪ That question might not even matter anymore. I haven't thought about it. A path where I can’t walk with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time has passed since then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Loves Only You still doesn’t have a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Middle-aged Lifter
text_block_list.text: Aren’t we taking away your opportunities?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Saying you’re taking away my opportunities? That’s not true at all. I'm making sure to set aside time for training, too.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: [ But if streaming ends up becoming a burden on your contract ] ...?

text_block_list.name: Middle-aged Lifter
text_block_list.text: [ I don’t mind if I only watch from afar ]

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: 『Just watching from afar』…you mean?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: [ If the reason you can’t find a trainer is because of us ]

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: …Hehe, really. You really don’t need to worry about that.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: There are still plenty of trainers at Tracen Academy. It’s just that I had some differences in opinion with a few people.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: ...Say. Does anyone remember the story about when I was little?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Alright! Today’s special event! The winner of today’s kids’ race is Loves Only You-chan!

text_block_list.name: Young Loves
text_block_list.text: Yay~! Papa~! Mommy~! Did you see~!?

text_block_list.name: Loves’ Mother
text_block_list.text: Hehe, yes, congratulations on your victory ♪ Mommy is so happy, Loves ♪

text_block_list.name: Loves’ Father
text_block_list.text: Honey, look at Loves’ smile! Ahh, I wish more people could see this smile…!

text_block_list.name: Loves’ Father
text_block_list.text: Look, Loves. This is the streaming you said you wanted to try. Look at the camera here and try saying hello.

text_block_list.name: Young Loves
text_block_list.text: H-h-hello?

text_block_list.name: Passionate teacher
text_block_list.text: [ Hello! ]

text_block_list.name: Young Loves
text_block_list.text: Hwah!? Papa! Look, it popped up here with Hello!

text_block_list.name: 3-Day Type Girl
text_block_list.text: You’re so small and cute, but wow, you’re really fast! That race just made me your fan!

text_block_list.name: Young Loves
text_block_list.text: Fan…?

text_block_list.name: Loves’ Father
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, it means people who really like you, Loves!

text_block_list.name: Young Loves
text_block_list.text: Wow…!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: [ Loves-chan was so small back then ]...

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's right. This brings back memories. …This place is special to me. It’s where I first met all of you.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: And more than anything...

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: This is the place where I found my own love. A love that belongs only to me.
